# edgecenter_cdn_client_info (Data Source)

CDN client info, including CNAME target for DNS configuration.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (Number) CDN client ID
- `cname` (String) CNAME target (e.g. cl-XXXXX.edgecdn.ru)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
